Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Vazproz Electric to get the job done right.

“Vazproz Electric upgraded my electrical panel in my older home in North Park. They were professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. I highly recommend them! The new panel handles my modern appliances without any issues.”

Maria G. Electrical Panel Upgrade
Mar 15, 2025

“We hired Vazproz Electric to install recessed lighting in our kitchen in La Jolla. The work was done well, and the electricians were courteous. There was a slight delay due to a parts shortage, but they communicated promptly.”

David S. Lighting Installation
Apr 2, 2025

“I had a dead outlet in my living room, and Vazproz Electric came out quickly to fix it. The electrician was knowledgeable and identified the problem right away. The price was reasonable, and I appreciated their prompt service.”

Jessica L. Outlet Repair
Apr 18, 2025

“Vazproz Electric did an excellent job rewiring our entire house in Hillcrest. They were very thorough and paid attention to detail. The team was respectful of our home and cleaned up after themselves. We feel much safer now with the new wiring.”

Robert K. Whole-House Rewiring
May 5, 2025

“I had Vazproz Electric install a ceiling fan on my patio in Pacific Beach. The installation was quick and easy. The electrician gave me good advice on choosing a fan that could withstand the coastal weather. I am very happy with the results.”

Susan M. Ceiling Fan Installation
May 20, 2025

“We used Vazproz Electric for an electrical inspection before buying a home in Scripps Ranch. The inspection was thorough and gave us peace of mind. They identified a few minor issues that we were able to address before closing on the house.”

Michael P. Electrical Inspection
Jun 10, 2025
Vazproz Electric

Trusted electrician professionals serving San Diego, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
